Row.Text: A civilization led by Akane Kurokawa. Centered on the LALALAI Troupe and Stage Actors, it uses performances, district synergy, and role switching to spread cultural strength into faith, science, production, and combat.

Akane Kurokawa excels at reading the stage and understanding roles. By switching among Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby, she can redirect cultural, faith, science, production, and combat strengths to whatever the moment demands.

The LALALAI Troupe grants extra yields to adjacent specialty districts and boosts relevant building yields by +50%. Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Encampments, and Holy Sites adjacent to a LALALAI Troupe also gain matching Great Person points, and those points continue to scale with the district's building tiers.

Akane starts in a Not Selected state and can switch between Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby. Each switch immediately changes her active bonuses (10-turn cooldown on Standard speed) and grants +16% to all yields for half of the current game-speed cooldown duration. Base effect "Reasoning Master": Campuses adjacent to a LALALAI Troupe gain +1 [ICON_Science] Science, and each tier of Campus buildings there (Library, University, Research Lab) grants an additional +1 [ICON_Science] Science. After researching Mathematics, gain +10% [ICON_Science] Science; after researching Scientific Theory, gain a further +10% [ICON_Science] Science. Her baseline pushes toward war timing and production bursts.

Unique district replacing the Theater Square. Provides a base +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture and +2 Amenities, while keeping the Theater Square's normal xp2 Wonder, district, Government Plaza, and entertainment-district Culture adjacency rules. Each adjacent City Center grants +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture and an additional +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold; each adjacent Entertainment Complex, Water Park, or equivalent replacement district grants +2 [ICON_Culture] Culture; and each adjacent Wonder grants +2 [ICON_Culture] Culture and an additional +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold. Adjacent Commercial Hubs and Harbors gain +1 [ICON_Gold] Gold, Campuses gain +1 [ICON_Science] Science, Encampments and Industrial Zones gain +1 [ICON_Production] Production, and Holy Sites gain +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith. Specialists in this district also provide +2 [ICON_Food] Food and +1 [ICON_Production] Production each.

Akane's unique civilian unit with 3 performances. Each performance targets an owned LALALAI Troupe in one of your cities (one performance per city), doubling the adjacency bonuses of that LALALAI Troupe and its adjacent specialty districts, and removes the unit only after the final show.

Perform on this owned LALALAI Troupe. Uses 1 performance charge ({1_num} remaining). One performance per city. The adjacency bonuses of this city's LALALAI Troupe and its adjacent Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Encampments, Industrial Zones, and Holy Sites are doubled; this includes both the xp2 Theater Square base adjacency bonuses and the additional adjacency bonuses granted by LALALAI. Each Amphitheater, Art Museum, Archaeological Museum, and Broadcast Center in this city gains an additional +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture, and each such building also adds +20% Tourism for the whole city. Also starts stackable empire-wide Art Prosperity. The unit is removed only after its final performance.
[ICON_Culture] Stage performance reward applied. This unit has {1_num} performance(s) remaining. Empire-wide Art Prosperity is active: {2_num} stack(s), {3_num} turn(s) remaining.
Akane mode switching is ready again.

Adopt Hoshino Ai's role focus. Grants +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith; Great Prophet points are +1 flat and +1 per Holy Site district; +30% [ICON_Faith] Faith; and +10 Religious Strength in theological combat for all religious units. Faith-purchased units and buildings refund 80% of that Faith cost as Gold, and recruiting a Great Person grants a random Inspiration for a currently unlockable civic. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.

Adopt Sayahime's role focus. Grants +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture; Great Artist points are +1 flat and +1 per LALALAI Troupe district; +20% [ICON_Culture] Culture; and +30% Tourism. Each Great Person retirement also grants a random Eureka. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.

Adopt Hoshino Ruby's role focus. Grants +5 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength and +1 Movement to all units; +1 flat [ICON_Production] Production; Great General points are +1 flat and +1 per Encampment district; and +1 [ICON_Production] Production per Encampment. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.
Hoshino Ai mode triggered: random Inspiration granted for {1}.
Hoshino Ai mode triggered: refunded {1_num} [ICON_Gold] Gold.
Sayahime mode triggered: random Eureka granted for {1}.
Switched to {1}. This mode is now on cooldown for {2_num} turn(s); +16% to all yields lasts {3_num} turn(s).
Mode switch unavailable. {1_num} turn(s) of cooldown remaining.
Akane mode switching is not available for this player.
+2 [ICON_Culture] Culture from each adjacent Entertainment Complex.
+2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent City Center.
+1 [ICON_Science] Science from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Faith] Faith from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
